# OutSystems.Extension.Bogus

> An OutSystems Developer Cloud (ODC) external library for generating realistic fake/test data. Wraps the .NET Bogus library and exposes 74 server actions for ODC applications, including 11 bulk generation actions.

## What this project does

This library lets OutSystems Developer Cloud (ODC) applications generate fake data — names, addresses, emails, phone numbers, credit card numbers, dates, lorem ipsum text, and more — directly within server action flows. It wraps the popular .NET Bogus library (https://github.com/bchavez/Bogus) as an ODC external library using the OutSystems.ExternalLibraries.SDK.

## Key features

- 74 server actions in a single unified interface (IFakeBogus / FakeBogus), organized into 11 regions: Person, Address, Company, Finance, Internet, Text, Commerce, Date, System, Randomizer, and Bulk Generation
- 63 single-value actions + 11 bulk generation actions returning List<T>
- Locale support: 50+ locales (en, pt_BR, fr, de, ja, zh_CN, es, etc.)
- Deterministic output: set seed > 0 for reproducible results; seed = 0 for random
- Two data structures: FakePersonData (9 fields) and FakeCurrencyData (3 fields)
- Bulk generation: GenerateFakePersons, FakeEmails, FakeAmounts, etc. generate up to 10,000 records in a single call
- Input validation: count (1–10,000), wordCount (1–1,000), length (1–100,000), decimals (0–10), range checks

## Technical stack

- Language: C# / .NET 8.0
- Runtime target: linux-x64 (framework-dependent)
- Core dependency: Bogus v35.6.1
- ODC SDK: OutSystems.ExternalLibraries.SDK v1.5.0
- Test framework: NUnit 4.4.0
- License: BSD-2-Clause

## Project structure

- OutSystems.Bogus/ — Main library (1 interface IFakeBogus, 1 implementation FakeBogus with 74 methods in 11 regions, 2 data structures, 1 helper)
- OutSystems.Bogus.UnitTests/ — Unit tests (11 test classes, one per region + bulk tests)
- .github/workflows/ — CI (test.yml) and release (release.yml) pipelines

## Interface structure

Single unified interface: IFakeBogus (OSInterface Name = "Bogus") with 74 methods in 11 #region blocks:

- Person region: 9 actions (names, email, phone, DOB, job title, full person)
- Address region: 9 actions (address, city, country, zip, state, street, lat/long)
- Company region: 4 actions (company name, suffix, catch phrase, BS)
- Finance region: 7 actions (credit card, CVV, IBAN, BIC, amount, currency, account)
- Internet region: 7 actions (URL, IP, IPv6, MAC, password, color, user agent)
- Text region: 6 actions (word, words, sentence, paragraph, paragraphs, slug)
- Commerce region: 6 actions (product name, price, department, category, EAN-13, EAN-8)
- Date region: 5 actions (past, future, between, recent, soon)
- System region: 4 actions (file name, MIME type, extension, semver)
- Randomizer region: 6 actions (GUID, number, decimal, boolean, hash, alphanumeric)
- Bulk Generation region: 11 actions (persons, emails, addresses, companies, amounts, URLs, sentences, products, past dates, numbers, GUIDs)

Note: ODC allows only 1 OSInterface per DLL, hence the consolidation into a single interface.

## Common parameters

- locale (string, default "en"): Controls the language/region of generated data
- seed (int, default 0): When > 0, produces deterministic output; when 0, random

## Installation

1. Download the ZIP from the GitHub Releases page
2. Upload it as an external library in the ODC Portal (Forge > External Libraries)
3. In ODC Studio, add public elements by searching for "Bogus" or specific action names

## Links

- Source: See the repository root
- Bogus library: https://github.com/bchavez/Bogus
- OutSystems ODC docs: https://www.outsystems.com/developer-cloud/
